title: Sales Drop in Central Region
detail: Revenue in Central region declined 41.0% over the last 90 days (₹2,833,867 → ₹1,672,077).
recommendation: Investigate root causes in Central: competitor activity, rep performance, or pricing issues. Consider urgent sales blitz or discounting campaign.

title: Strong Growth in East Region
detail: Revenue in East surged 37.4% vs the prior 90 days. (₹1,217,924 → ₹1,672,822).
recommendation: Replicate the winning strategy from East in underperforming regions.

title: Sales Drop in North Region
detail: Revenue in North region declined 22.0% over the last 90 days (₹2,294,869 → ₹1,789,965).
recommendation: Investigate root causes in North: competitor activity, rep performance, or pricing issues. Consider urgent sales blitz or discounting campaign.

title: Sales Drop in South Region
detail: Revenue in South region declined 43.0% over the last 90 days (₹2,795,447 → ₹1,592,354).
recommendation: Investigate root causes in South: competitor activity, rep performance, or pricing issues. Consider urgent sales blitz or discounting campaign.

title: Sales Drop in West Region
detail: Revenue in West region declined 47.0% over the last 90 days (₹2,448,812 → ₹1,298,577).
recommendation: Investigate root causes in West: competitor activity, rep performance, or pricing issues. Consider urgent sales blitz or discounting campaign.

title: Overall Churn Rate: 39.5%
detail: High customer churn detected. 789 out of 2,000 customers have churned.
recommendation: Launch targeted retention campaigns. Focus on customers with NPS < 5 and last login > 60 days as highest-priority re-engagement targets.

title: Highest Churn in East Region (50.5%)
detail: East has the highest churn rate at 50.5%, well above the company average of 39.5%.
recommendation: Assign a dedicated customer success manager to East. Offer loyalty discounts and schedule quarterly business reviews.

title: Segment Churn Breakdown
recommendation: Focus retention efforts on SMB segment first.

title: Top Churn Predictors (ML Model)
detail: Machine learning analysis identified the strongest churn signals: Last Login Days, Annual Spend, Support Tickets.
recommendation: Build early-warning alerts when customers show: last login > 60 days, NPS < 5, or support tickets > 10 in a 30-day window.

title: Product C is the Revenue Leader
detail: Product C accounts for ₹17,946,125 in total revenue (22.3% of total).
recommendation: Expand Product C cross-sell opportunities across all regions.

title: Product A Needs Attention
detail: Product A has the lowest revenue at ₹15,104,786 (18.7% of total).
recommendation: Review Product A pricing, positioning, and sales enablement materials.

title: Avg Profit Margin: 43.6%
detail: Company-wide average profit margin is 43.6%. West has the lowest margin at 43.5%.
recommendation: Review discount policies in West. Target margin floor of 35%.
